Natacha Elmir Photography is a professional wedding photographer based in Barcelona, Spain. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Natacha Elmir Photography brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 134 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
